content: *도구, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 5 lbs **가치:** 1 GP --- **능력:** 민첩 {color="red"} **활용:** 옷의 찢어진 부분 수선 (DC 10) 또는 작은 디자인 바느질 (DC 10) {color="red"} **제작:** [누비 갑옷](/212f7f5a1e8081ceaafbc48132ee2f92?pvs=25), [바구니](/212f7f5a1e808195b2eacd8bb91d6839?pvs=25), [침낭](/212f7f5a1e80811b9a62d2dc4dadb75f?pvs=25), [담요](/212f7f5a1e8081cfa4dde62c30824051?pvs=25), [고급 복장](/212f7f5a1e8081de8ec5c45efecf5fd7?pvs=25), [그물](/212f7f5a1e8081df8937c7846a459d6c?pvs=25), [로브](/212f7f5a1e80817abb3cd7b02f809066?pvs=25), [밧줄](/212f7f5a1e8081209061f85619dae8f0?pvs=25), [자루](/212f7f5a1e80815786a3dc36a2b8ae7a?pvs=25), [끈](/212f7f5a1e808197901bdeb781f16301?pvs=25), [텐트](/212f7f5a1e8081acb8e7c895541ac5ff?pvs=25), [여행자의 복장](/212f7f5a1e808135afc9dc8bc818bc1d?pvs=25) {color="red"}
